description_long: This radiator features a tall, rectangular form with a series of evenly spaced horizontal slats running across its main surfaces, likely designed to maximize heat dissipation. The body is a uniform brown color, with a matte finish that reduces glare and gives it a utilitarian appearance. The top surface is flat and unadorned except for a small, raised rectangular section, possibly for mounting or a control element. The sides are smooth and solid, while the front and back display the prominent slatted grille pattern. The base appears slightly wider, suggesting stability for floor-standing installation. There are no visible pipe connections or valves, indicating these may be located on the underside or concealed within the design.
description: A tall, brown radiator with horizontal slats on its main faces and a flat, matte-finished top. The design is utilitarian, with a prominent grille pattern for heat dissipation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile and the horizontal slats running the full height of the radiator.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, flat face with evenly spaced horizontal slats and a solid base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the narrow profile and slatted design seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view, identical to the front, with the same horizontal slat pattern and solid base.
attribute_pipe_connections: none visible; likely concealed at the base or underside
